case_title: JANOS PAL VS. DOUGLAS BURROWS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAL, JANOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURROWS, DOUGLAS DOES 1-10 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 81 CEDAR STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 (COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO), LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75251121)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BURROWS, DOUGLAS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (COMMERCIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAL, JANOS AS TO DEFENDANT BURROWS, DOUGLAS DOES 1-10
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAL, JANOS AS TO DEFENDANT BURROWS, DOUGLAS DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75073755), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAL, JANOS SERVED NOV-14-2024, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (TRANSACTION ID # 74233172) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAL, JANOS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75073755), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAL, JANOS SERVED NOV-14-2024, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT BURROWS, DOUGLAS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $82.19/DAY (TRANSACTION ID # 75251121) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAL, JANOS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 75251121) AS TO DEFENDANT BURROWS, DOUGLAS DOES 1-10
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BURROWS, DOUGLAS
DECLARATION OF ELECTRONIC LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 75251121) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAL, JANOS
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE-UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 75251121) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAL, JANOS
